users.description: 用户信息表，记录注册用户的基本资料
users.ddl: CREATE TABLE users (user_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(50), age INT, city VARCHAR(50), register_date DATE);

orders.description: 订单交易主表，记录每笔销售和消费明细
orders.ddl: CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, order_date DATE, amount DECIMAL(10,2), status VARCHAR(20));
